response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned polyglot engineer with 25+ years of experience and demonstrated high-scale distributed systems work, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core specialization this role demands. There is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or statistical analysis — all of which are central to the Principal Growth/Experimentation Systems role. His current trajectory is full-stack product engineering and AI tooling, not measurement-driven growth infrastructure. At a Principal/IC6 bar with deep domain requirements, the gap is too wide to bridge in an interview.
strengths: 25+ years of polyglot engineering with hands-on production code across C++, Java, C#, TypeScript, and D, satisfying the language breadth requirement
Proven high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second using low-latency async I/O and microservices
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP-based developer tooling at re:cinq, signaling relevance to the cloud AI developer tools industry context
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience is mentioned anywhere in the resume
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipeline, or statistical/experimental analysis work is demonstrated — the core technical domain of this role is entirely absent
No evidence of cross-team technical leadership at Principal scope or translating ambiguous business goals into measurable, multi-team engineering systems

key_factors.factor: No telemetry, metrics, or data aptitude demonstrated
